name: essay-humanizer
tagline: Rewrite AI-drafted essays toward human CAWSE/LOCNESS baselines with 24 weighted de-AI patterns + fine-tuned LoRA
description: Fine-tuned MLX LoRA on Qwen3-8B (configurable) that humanizes argumentative/academic essays. Grounded in CAWSE Merit/Distinction + LOCNESS vs DeepSeek counterparts; pattern weights from corpus analysis (Mann-Whitney) plus MDD/ADD syntactic targets. Includes trained LoRA adapter (9 MB), inference script, and corpus-derived weights. Requires Apple Silicon macOS with MLX installed (one-time setup). Optional hosted FastAPI for MCP/tool linking on non-Mac machines.
